_comment: DSSE v1.0 PAE known-answer vectors (AW-2 AC1). PAE(type, payload) = "DSSEv1" SP LEN(type) SP type SP LEN(payload) SP payload, where SP is one ASCII space (0x20) and LEN is the BYTE length as ASCII decimal. These are pinned so any 2036 re-implementation can confirm byte-for-byte. The `pae_string` is the human-readable UTF-8 of the PAE bytes; `pae_hex` is the canonical byte sequence.

cases.name: in-toto-json-simple
cases.note: The AWP payloadType with a trivial JSON payload. payloadType is 28 bytes, payload is 7 bytes.

cases.name: multibyte-payload
cases.note: Edge: payload contains a 2-byte UTF-8 character (U+00E9, 'é'). LEN counts BYTES (2), not characters (1) — this case fails any char-length implementation.
